tasks.title: Repository map
tasks.initialPrompt: Map this repository using Codexplorer tools first: start with `file_tree` or `list_directory`, then use `find_files`, `grep`, and focused `read_range` calls to verify main modules, entry points, and top-level responsibilities. Capture concise evidence-backed notes under an `artifacts/` folder in your current workspace. Do not modify repository source files, tests, or configuration. Keep all task-owned artifacts under an `artifacts/` folder in your current workspace.
